query:
UPDATE lectures 
SET description = 'Master the art of selecting the optimal research study design for your clinical questions. Learn how different study designs impact research validity, feasibility, and outcomes.

📚 Key Topics:
• Evidence hierarchy and study design quality
• Matching research questions to appropriate designs
• Observational vs interventional studies
• Case-control, cohort, and cross-sectional designs
• Common pitfalls and how to avoid them

👨‍⚕️ Dr. Abdullah M. Al Alawi
Founder, MedResearch Academy'
WHERE id = 60001;
